plugins.name: Git
plugins.author: mistysys
plugins.overview: Seamlessly integrate Git version control into Misty so users can inspect repository state, review changes, and work with commits without leaving the workspace.

plugins.name: Quick Convert
plugins.author: Misty
plugins.overview: Quick Convert helps users convert images, audio, and video into common formats without leaving Misty.

plugins.name: Themes
plugins.author: Misty
plugins.overview: Themes is Misty's built-in theme builder for presets and token editing.

plugins.name: Vault
plugins.author: Misty
plugins.overview: Vault provides encrypted, deduplicated backups powered by restic.

plugins.name: yt-dlp
plugins.author: Misty
